{{Infobox construct
| name = Soulbound Vessel
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

''See also: [[Soulbound Vessel Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A [[Soulbound]] [[Vessel]] is an [[Awakened object]] that serves as the source of power for a [[Soulbound]] individual. These objects are typically small and unobtrusive, though they can range from jewelry and weapons to entire ships or sets of tools. To function as a [[Vessel]], an object must contain components or [[essence]] from an [[Elder]] or a [[Kameira]]. While many [[Vessels]] are singular items like daggers, rings, or staves, some individuals are bound to multiple objects or even a collection of tools. In specialized cases, such as with certain navigators, an entire ship can be transformed into a [[Vessel]] through the integration of [[Elder]] parts. The relationship between a [[Soulbound]] and their [[Vessel]] is deeply intimate, often described as being as fundamental to the person as hunger or a part of their own body. This connection allows [[Soulbound]] to wield extraordinary abilities, such as physical enhancement, elemental manipulation, or the ability to enter berserk states. However, this bond can be volatile; the [[Vessel]]'s desires and [[Intent]] can influence or even struggle for control over the user. While some users perceive their [[Vessels]] as conscious entities with voices, others do not. Because a [[Soulbound]]'s power is entirely dependent on their connection to the object, identifying and seizing or destroying a [[Vessel]] is a primary tactic for neutralizing them in combat.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder Marten]] possesses a [[Soulbound]] [[Vessel]] that he is able to command. This vessel, which takes the form of his ship, responds directly to his [[Intent]] and allows him to sense its presence. Rather than using spoken language, the entity communicates with [[Calder]] through various impulses, impressions, and physical pressure. Additionally, the cook on board utilizes his own power by focusing it into the [[Soulbound]] [[Vessel]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder Marten]] has a [[Soulbound Vessel]] that he can command.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] has a [[Soulbound Vessel]] that responds to his [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c7">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder's ship]] is a [[Soulbound Vessel]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c17">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Soulbound Vessel]] communicates through impressions, impulses, and pressure rather than words.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c21">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The cook's power is focused into his [[Soulbound Vessel]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder Marten]] can sense the presence of his [[Soulbound Vessel]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|If [[Naberius Clayborn]] takes the [[Heart]] as his [[Soulbound Vessel]], he would become a [[Soulbound]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|A [[Soulbound Vessel]] was made from a [[Stormwing]]'s stinger for [[Tristania]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Jerri]]'s [[Soulbound Vessel]] started up again.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c3">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Someone returned [[Jerri]]'s [[Soulbound Vessel]] to her in her cell.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c22">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] has already taken a [[Soulbound Vessel]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c13">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Some speculate [[Jarelys Teach]]'s [[Soulbound Vessel]] makes her a monster.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c14">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] has a [[Soulbound Vessel]] that she handled poorly.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c17">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[The Testament]] serves as the [[Soulbound]] [[Vessel]] for [[Calder]], though such vessels can manifest as a collection of tools rather than one solitary object. While [[Bliss]] also possesses a [[Soulbound]] [[Vessel]], the destruction of such an entity can cause unpredictable consequences for the mind of its owner. One woman suffered facial scarring that extended from her chin to her vessel, and [[Calder]] is able to repair his own through dedicated love and attention. In the case of [[Foster]], his [[Soulbound]] [[Vessel]] took control during a period of unconsciousness to ensure his survival.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">7</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[The Testament]] is [[Calder]]'s [[Soulbound Vessel]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c4">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Bliss]] has a [[Soulbound Vessel]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|A [[Soulbound Vessel]] can be a set of tools rather than a single object.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c18">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Destroying a [[Soulbound Vessel]] can have unpredictable effects on the mind of the [[Soulbound]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The woman's face was ruined from her chin to her [[Soulbound Vessel]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] can repair his [[Soulbound Vessel]] with love, care, and attention.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Foster]]'s [[Soulbound Vessel]] took over when he lost consciousness to keep him alive.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c26">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A [[Soulbound]] [[Vessel]] is a unique entity or power that can be bound to an individual, such as the specific type associated with [[Tyria]]. While some might mistake personal equipment like [[Interion Darovish]]'s [[sword]] and shield for such a connection, these items are not [[Soulbound Vessels]]. These vessels can manifest as objects like a helmet, which grants the wearer a powerful berserk state. In the case of [[Loreli]], she raised her own vessel and is able to tap into its power to generate light.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A [[Soulbound Vessel]] is a type of entity that can be bound to a person.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A [[Soulbound Vessel]] can be a helmet that allows the user to enter a powerful, berserk state.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Interion Darovish]]'s [[sword]] and shield are not his [[Soulbound Vessel]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c12">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A [[Soulbound Vessel]] is a specific type of object or power associated with individuals like [[Tyria]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Loreli]] raised her [[Soulbound Vessel]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c19">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Loreli]] taps into her [[Soulbound Vessel]] to make light.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c24">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
